title: salsola iberica
intro: Salsola iberica, also known as prickly saltwort, is a shrub-like plant that belongs to the Amaranthaceae family, characterized by its prickly leaves and stems. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Salsola iberica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Salsola iberica can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for a convenient and accessible way to harness its medicinal properties.
